Timeline.Description: Create folder tree with all HTML files (index, home/public, admin, student, teacher, parent, password pages).
Set up assets/ for CSS, images, logo.
Set up scripts/ for JS logic (app.js, auth.js, ui.js).
Set up data/master.json for centralized data.
Include Bootstrap 5 for responsive design.
Define language toggle (EN | BN | AR) in header.
Build meta section in master.json.
Build public section in master.json.
Build index section in master.json.
Build roles sections (Admin, Teacher, Student, Parent).
Build password_pages section in master.json.
Integrate index.html with master.json.index (hero, menu, widgets).
Integrate home.html/public.html with master.json.public.
Integrate admin.html with master.json.admin.
Integrate teacher.html with master.json.teacher.
Integrate student.html with master.json.student.
Integrate parent.html with master.json.parent.
Integrate password pages with master.json.password_pages.
Develop app.js to fetch master.json and populate HTML dynamically.
Develop auth.js to validate user login against id + password.
Develop ui.js to handle language switch and responsive menu toggle.
Apply Bootstrap grid for dashboard cards.
Ensure mobile navigation collapses into hamburger menu.
Test layouts on mobile, tablet, desktop.
Ensure passwords are validated via JS, not exposed in HTML.
Test login flows for all roles.
Test JSON data loading across all pages.
Test responsiveness across devices.
Host project on GitHub Pages or institutional server.
Verify JSON loads correctly in production.
Complete documentation in docs/requirements.md and docs/roadmap.md.
